title: 30-60-90 Day Plan — Product Lead, Padel AI Platform

candidate_profile.domain_gap: Zero playing-level expertise in padel; mitigated by advisory coach pool and JTBD interviews with rated competitors and certified coaches.

context_anchors.product_shape: Subscription B2C with B2B2C hedge; smartphone-only capture; AI/CV stack on top of an OSS baseline.
context_anchors.critical_chain: CC-1 (rating-clarity backbone): SUB-001a → SUB-001b → SUB-001c → JS-001

phase_a_days_0_30.title: Discovery and anchor
objectives: Establish a documented mental model of the rating-clarity backbone (CC-1) and the coach-renewal chain (CC-2) before touching scope.
Validate or kill the top-10 hypotheses inherited from prior research without re-running existing work.
Stand up the JTBD interview cohort across the three PASS segments.
Scope a single-club manual MVP loop without launching it.

stakeholders.purpose: Strategic alignment, kill-experiment authority, pricing signoff.

stakeholders.phrasing: The role would coordinate with eng as currently staffed; no headcount asks during the first 30 days.

stakeholders.purpose: Recap card UX, partner-share surface, share-link semantics.
Direct-readership newsletter cadence, CIS Telegram group operation, club outreach scheduling.

stakeholders.cadence: Two structured sessions in month 1; on-call thereafter.
stakeholders.purpose: Substitute for candidate domain gap; ground-truth shot taxonomy and drill prescriptions; review pilot recaps.

composition.label: Plateau-stuck regular
composition.interview_focus: Switch trigger calibration: separate self-perceived plateau from partner-comparison loss; confirm alternatives_hired set (Padelytics, Clutch, club camera, paid coach).

composition.label: Newly-ranked competitor
composition.interview_focus: Tournament-loss → reach-for-tool latency; rating-portability willingness across federation, Premier Padel, and derived sources.

composition.label: Club coach (B2B2C)
composition.interview_focus: Renewal-conversation pain; refusal patterns on tools the student touches; LTV math on coach-affiliate channel.

explicit_exclusions.reason: Killed by Phase 06 red team — venue-size descriptor, fold operator interactions into coach segment.
Killed by Phase 06 red team — life-situation label without verified switch trigger.
Merge into SEG-001 per Phase 06 recommendation.

review_targets: Top-10 hypotheses listed in this artifact's hypothesis_backlog.
Jobs graph critical chains CC-1 and CC-2 (evidence/20260501T135005Z/05_jobs_graph.json).
kill_or_keep_outputs: Annotated hypothesis backlog with status: keep / kill / promote-to-experiment.
Killed hypotheses move to a graveyard log; reactivation requires new evidence.

deliverables: Pilot brief: target club profile (Madrid or Barcelona, 4–8 courts, 1 coach champion).
Manual loop diagram: capture → tag → recap → drill → next session.
Reliability thresholds for graduating each step out of manual ops.
Privacy / consent flow draft (GDPR baseline, 152-FZ flagged for Russian-language path).

output_artifacts: Validated AJTBD canvas per PASS segment.
Prioritised hypothesis backlog (this document section D).
PRD outline for the manual MVP loop.
Instrumentation spec covering match-upload, share, partner-invite, and recap-acknowledgement events.
Risk register v1 (this document section F).

phase_b_days_31_60.title: Manual MVP and pricing test
objectives: Run the manual measurement → insight → training loop in one club end-to-end without productising any step.
Run the WTP smoke test in Spanish and Russian against the EUR 7.99 anchor.
Begin the first 4-week retention cohort (week 5–8 of pilot).
Make the first kill/keep call against segment-level evidence.

manual_mvp_loop.description: The role would coordinate the pilot personally for week 1 of execution: clubs film matches on a tripod-mounted phone; the OSS baseline (Joao-M-Silva/padel_analytics) auto-tags shots; the candidate plus advisory coach review three matches per pilot user; a recap card and a two-drill prescription get sent to the player and copied to the coach before the next booking.
manual_mvp_loop.instrumentation_events_out_of_scope_note: Pair-share viral mechanics (share_clicked, partner_invited, partner_activated) are explicitly out of scope for the 90-day window. The manual MVP loop in 03_mvp_loop_design.md is single-player → coach. Pair-share viral surface requires a Stage 2.5 build that is not part of this manual pilot.
reliability_gates_to_productise: Tagging step graduates to product when human-correction rate ≤ 15% across 50 matches.
Recap template graduates when ≥ 70% of recaps require zero advisory coach edits.
Drill prescription graduates when ≥ 60% of recaps result in a logged drill within seven days.

wtp_smoke_test.design: Two landing pages — Spanish (es.padelaicoach.example) and Russian (ru.padelaicoach.example) — each with a fake-door 'request a padel rating' CTA priced at EUR 7.99/month and the rouble-equivalent (RUB 499/month direct-channel pricing per evidence/20260501T135005Z/10_monetization.json).
wtp_smoke_test.primary_metric: Free-to-paid intent conversion within the first 30 days of activation.

anchor_threshold.internal_synthesised_threshold: Internal threshold synthesised from Foundry CRO 2026 5-9% free-to-paid range: at EUR 7.99/month, ≥8% paid conversion within three matches is keep; <4% triggers hedge model (B2B coach SaaS). The EUR 7.99 anchor and the three-match window are internal product policy, not Foundry-published thresholds.
anchor_threshold.foundry_cro_underlying_quote: Foundry CRO 2026 free-to-paid 5-9% within 30 days (verbatim quote sits in evidence/02_subscription_economics.json B_funnel_benchmarks.F4_free_to_paid)
anchor_threshold.red_team_fix_note: Per red-team HIGH-2: removed quotation marks. Cite Foundry CRO ONLY for the 5-9% range with the verbatim quote already in 02 evidence.

secondary_metrics: CTR on padel community channels (≥ 6% per Phase 06 SEG-001 kill experiment).
Direct-traffic share of beta sign-ups (target ≥ 40% within 8 weeks per evidence/20260501T135005Z/11_gtm.json#CH-001).
wtp_smoke_test.kill_decision_logic: If WTP < 4% after 4 weeks AND direct-traffic share < 25%, the hedge model (B2B coach SaaS at EUR 19–29 per coach per month) becomes primary; the role would draft the pivot memo for founder signoff.

first_retention_cohort.primary_metric: Weekly active uploaders with ≥ 1 acknowledged insight per week.

output_artifacts: Pilot weekly review packet (one-pager + recap exemplars).
Conversion-curve dashboard (free → activated → paid) updated weekly.
First kill/keep memo on segments and pricing tier.
Retention cohort dashboard wired to Mixpanel-or-equivalent (engineering-staffed; no new tooling spend assumed).

phase_c_days_61_90.title: Productisation and channel
objectives: Pull the manual steps that meet reliability thresholds into product surface.
Open a second club pilot to test transferability of the pilot recipe.
Run the first paid-acquisition test against a capped budget.
Decide between FIP integration vs derived-only on the rating path.

productisation_targets.promote_if: ≥ 70% of recaps require zero advisory coach edits during phase B.
≥ 10% of free uploads convert to a drill plan acknowledgement.
≥ 70% of recaps closed with a coach-filed outcome tag in phase B.

post_pilot_exploration_only_not_a_90_day.exploration_metric_only: Pair-level surface drives ≥ 1.5x sharing rate vs single-user baseline.
post_pilot_exploration_only_not_a_90_day.rationale_for_exclusion: The manual MVP in 03 does not generate the pair-viral data needed to evaluate this gate inside 90 days; gating it inside this plan would be a sequencing error. Per red-team HIGH-1: explicitly out of scope for the 90-day window.

second_club_pilot.purpose: Test transferability without the candidate's hands on the wheel.
second_club_pilot.geo_target: Italy (Milan or Rome) to stress-test localisation.
second_club_pilot.kill_metric: If second-club week-4 cohort retention < 60% of first-club benchmark, the manual loop is over-fit to the original club; the role would pause Italy expansion and document the gap.

first_paid_acquisition_test.budget_phrasing: The role would propose a capped test budget at the lower bound of CAC × intended cohort size; exact figure pending founder signoff. No fixed budget is committed in this plan.
first_paid_acquisition_test.kill_metric: Paid CAC > 3x organic CAC after 4 weeks (per evidence/20260501T135005Z/13_capability_map.json#CH-008).

options: Option A — FIP organiser integration (CH-003): partner-dependent, two LOIs targeted in 6 weeks; gated on regional FIP-affiliated organisers.
Option B — Derived-only rating: ship the rating model on smartphone footage and expose a public profile that links out from Playtomic / MATCHi (PLG-004 in evidence/20260501T135005Z/11_gtm.json).
decision_criteria: If ≥ 2 LOIs signed by week 12, pursue Option A in parallel with B.

If 0 LOIs by week 12, default to Option B and revisit federation integration after the rating reaches ≥ 5,000 active rated players in ≥ 3 cities (expansion threshold per evidence/20260501T135005Z/10_monetization.json#expansion_thresholds).

output_artifacts: GTM dashboard (channel mix, CAC, payback period, direct-traffic share).
Decision memo on rating-platform path (FIP integration vs derived-only).
Productisation log: which manual steps graduated, which stayed manual, why.

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: Plateau-stuck regulars convert on partner-comparison triggers, not self-perceived plateau.
hypothesis_backlog.metric: % of SEG-001 interviewees citing a partner-driven event vs internal feeling.

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: Newly-ranked competitors will accept a derived rating if it travels across cities and clubs.
hypothesis_backlog.metric: % of SEG-002 interviewees willing to display derived rating publicly.

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: Club coaches will use the recap pack at renewal conversations.
hypothesis_backlog.metric: Coaches confirming intent to attach recap to renewal conversation.

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: Free-to-paid conversion at EUR 7.99/month (ES + IT) meets the internal-synthesised kill threshold of ≥ 8% within three matches.
hypothesis_backlog.metric: WTP smoke-test conversion rate (Spanish + Italian landing). Russian smoke-test runs as a fact-finding test, not a kill gate, because paid Meta and ASA are unavailable in the Russian channel mix per evidence/02 RU Direct-channel scenario.
hypothesis_backlog.threshold: ES + IT: ≥ 8% paid conversion (kill below 4%). RU: fact-finding only — clearable thresholds are organic-only since paid channels are structurally null.
hypothesis_backlog.source: evidence/20260501T135005Z/10_monetization.json#wtp_test; internal-synthesised threshold per red-team HIGH-2 fix
hypothesis_backlog.red_team_demote_note: Per red-team HIGH-3: H-04 retains the kill gate for ES + IT. The RU smoke-test is demoted to fact-finding because the Russian channel mix is structurally constrained — paid Meta and ASA unavailable, so a kill threshold below 4% paid conversion would force the channel to fall back to organic-only, which is what the unit economics already validate (LTV:CAC organic = 5.32 in evidence/02 RU scenario).

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: Direct-readership newsletter owns the audience: ≥ 40% of beta sign-ups arrive via direct traffic within 8 weeks.
Recap-acknowledgement is a 4-week leading indicator of weekly active retention.
hypothesis_backlog.metric: Recap-open rate by week 2 vs week-4 weekly active.
hypothesis_backlog.threshold: Anchor — to be validated in week 5 cohort. No external benchmark; flagged as data gap.
hypothesis_backlog.source: data_gap; instrumentation spec from Phase A.

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: Coach-filed outcome tag rate stays ≥ 70% across the pilot cohort once weekly reminders are removed.
hypothesis_backlog.metric: Coach outcome-tag rate, weeks 5-8 of pilot, no reminder cadence.
hypothesis_backlog.red_team_replacement_note: Per red-team HIGH-1: original H-07 (pair-share viral lift) replaced with a different testable hypothesis. Pair-share viral mechanics are deferred to post-pilot exploration.

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: The pilot recipe transfers to a second club without candidate hands-on operation.
hypothesis_backlog.metric: Second-club week-4 cohort retention vs first-club benchmark.

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: Paid acquisition CAC stays within 3x organic CAC during the first paid test.
hypothesis_backlog.metric: Blended paid CAC (Meta + ASA) vs organic CAC anchor.

hypothesis_backlog.hypothesis: FIP-affiliated regional organisers will sign ≥ 2 LOIs within 6 weeks of structured outreach.
Localised cohort (Spanish + Russian) retains ≥ 1.3x English baseline through week 3.
Coach-driven student sign-ups carry a 90-day retention bonus over self-served sign-ups.
hypothesis_backlog.metric: Day-90 retention (coach-driven cohort vs self-served cohort).
hypothesis_backlog.threshold: Anchor — to be validated against first cohort closing day 120; flagged as data gap.

north_star.metric: Rated players completing 90-day retention with ≥ 1 weekly insight.
north_star.rationale: Combines retention and product engagement; aligns with subscription business and CC-1 (rating-clarity backbone).
north_star.benchmark_status: Anchor — to be validated in week 13 cohort; no public peer benchmark.

input_metrics.metric: Weekly match uploads per active user
input_metrics.purpose: Volume input to the rating model and the recap pipeline.

guardrail_metrics.benchmark_status: Anchor — to be validated in pilot weeks 5–8; threshold ≤ 15% of matches.
Binary — pass/fail review by external counsel before paid acquisition test.

risk_register.description: OSS capture pipeline (Joao-M-Silva/padel_analytics) cannot reach acceptable accuracy on representative club video sample.
risk_register.trigger_to_escalate: ≥ 25% of pilot matches require manual re-tagging at week 4; OR shot-classification accuracy < 70% on a 50-match validation set.
risk_register.mitigation: Run accuracy validation in week 1 of phase A on existing club footage; if below threshold, the role would pause productisation work and route to engineering for OSS-fork or model-swap path before any pilot launch.
risk_register.owner_pattern: PM coordinates; engineering owns accuracy work; advisory coach owns ground-truth labelling.

risk_register.description: WTP test fails the kill threshold (< 4% paid conversion) and the direct-channel audience does not materialise (< 25% direct-traffic share).
risk_register.trigger_to_escalate: WTP < 4% AND direct-traffic share < 25% by week 8 of phase B.
risk_register.mitigation: Pre-drafted pivot memo to hedge model (B2B coach SaaS at EUR 19–29 / coach / month) ready for founder signoff before week 8; segment recruitment expanded to SEG-003 in parallel.
risk_register.owner_pattern: PM owns memo; founder owns decision; ops owns coach recruitment.

risk_register.description: Coach-renewal chain (CC-2) collapses because coaches refuse any tool the student also touches.
risk_register.trigger_to_escalate: ≥ 5 of 8 coaches in pilot decline shared-tool model; coach-driven handoff rate < 5% by week 8.
risk_register.mitigation: Split product surface: coach-only dashboard (no student access) becomes a separate SKU; SEG-003 narrows to coach-only; B2B2C distribution claim retired with red-team-style memo.
risk_register.owner_pattern: PM owns SKU split; advisory coach pool owns the refusal-pattern interview; design owns coach-only surface.

risk_register.description: Privacy / regulatory drag on the Russian-language path (152-FZ on-device requirement) blocks the direct channel and the WTP test.
risk_register.trigger_to_escalate: External counsel flags hosting pattern as non-compliant; OR Telegram bot path rejected for the channel.
risk_register.mitigation: On-device inference path (VM-010) scoped in phase A as a parallel track; Russian-language WTP variant runs as a Telegram-flow CTA without external links if web path is gated; counsel review booked for week 2.
risk_register.owner_pattern: PM owns scoping; engineering owns on-device pipeline; ops owns Telegram bot operation; external counsel owns sign-off.

risk_register.description: Candidate domain gap (zero playing experience) leads to flawed interview design or bad recap content; advisory coach pool fails to scale.
risk_register.trigger_to_escalate: Two consecutive recap exemplars rejected by advisory coach pool; OR JTBD interviews surface frame-mismatch language (candidate using terminology no rated player recognises).
risk_register.mitigation: Advisory coach pool secured as paid retainer in week 1 of phase A; candidate sits in on coach-led drill sessions in weeks 2–3 to absorb shot taxonomy; every recap card reviewed by coach pool until reliability gate met.
risk_register.owner_pattern: PM owns retainer setup; advisory coach pool owns content review; founder owns ratification.

verified_urls.purpose: OSS feasibility anchor for capture-then-tag pipeline.
CAC benchmarks for organic, paid, ASO, community, affiliate channels.
Italy court count growth (12.9% YoY 2025); Spain 17,300 courts; SAM basis.
Active player benchmarks; SOM low-end basis.
Spanish federation chapter for coach recruitment.
Italian federation chapter for coach recruitment.
Counter-example: existing match-level analysis vendor selling to plateau players.
Coach co-pilot analogue from adjacent sports.

definition_of_done.phase_a: AJTBD canvas validated for SEG-001/002/003; hypothesis backlog promoted; PRD outline reviewed by eng lead; instrumentation spec reviewed by eng lead; no headcount committed.
definition_of_done.phase_b: Pilot ran 4 weeks end-to-end; WTP smoke test result on file with kill/keep memo; first retention cohort live; segment-level kill/keep memo signed by founder.
definition_of_done.phase_c: Reliability-gated steps shipped to product surface; second-club pilot live; paid-acquisition test results on file; rating-platform decision memo signed by founder; 90-day roadmap published.
